name: LiquidityPoolContract

methods.name: update_application
methods.desc: Allow creator to update the contract

methods.name: create_lp_token
methods.desc: Create the LP token for a specific pool

methods.name: add_liquidity

args.name: min_lp_tokens
args.desc: Minimum LP tokens to receive (slippage protection)

methods.desc: Add liquidity to a specific pool and receive LP tokens

methods.name: remove_liquidity

args.name: lp_token_payment
args.desc: Payment of LP tokens to burn

methods.desc: Remove liquidity from a pool by burning LP tokens

methods.name: swap

args.name: asset_out_id
args.desc: ID of output asset to receive

methods.desc: Swap one asset for another using constant product formula

methods.name: get_total_pools
methods.desc: Get total number of pools created

methods.name: compute_pool_id
methods.desc: Compute pool ID for an asset pair

methods.name: get_swap_quote
methods.desc: Get quote for a swap without executing

desc:
Automated Market Maker Liquidity Pool Factory

    Implements constant product (x * y = k) formula for decentralized trading.
    Supports multiple pools via box storage.
